queries.question: Give me the duration of sessions for every conference.
queries.sql: SELECT Sessions.duration  from conferences join conference_sessions ON conference_sessions.conference_id = Conferences.conference_id join sessions ON Conference_Sessions.session_type_id = Sessions.session_type_id GROUP BY Conference_Sessions.session_type_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Conference_Sessions.conference_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Conferences)

queries.question: Give me the duration of sessions for every conference.
queries.sql: select conferences.name , sessions.duration from conferences join conference_sessions ON conference_sessions.conference_id = Conferences.conference_id join sessions ON Conference_Sessions.session_type_id = Sessions.session_type_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?duration WHERE {
  ?conferences a :Conferences .
  ?conference_sessions a :Conference_Sessions .
  ?conference_sessions p:hasConferences ?conferences .
  ?sessions a :Sessions .
  ?conference_sessions p:hasSessions ?sessions .
  ?conferences p:name ?name .
  ?sessions p:duration ?duration .
}

queries.question: What session type and durations are there for every conference?
queries.sql: SELECT Sessions.session_type, Sessions.duration  from conferences join conference_sessions ON conference_sessions.conference_id = Conferences.conference_id join sessions ON Conference_Sessions.session_type_id = Sessions.session_type_id   GROUP BY Conference_Sessions.session_type_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Conference_Sessions.conference_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Conferences)

queries.question: What session type and durations are there for every conference?
queries.sql: select conferences.name , sessions.session_type , sessions.duration from conferences join conference_sessions ON conference_sessions.conference_id = Conferences.conference_id join sessions ON Conference_Sessions.session_type_id = Sessions.session_type_id
queries.sparql:

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

  ?sessions p:session_type ?session_type .
  ?sessions p:duration ?duration .
}

queries.question: Give me the sessions that each conference includes.
queries.sql: SELECT Sessions.session_type  from conferences join conference_sessions ON conference_sessions.conference_id = Conferences.conference_id join sessions ON Conference_Sessions.session_type_id = Sessions.session_type_id   GROUP BY Conference_Sessions.session_type_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Conference_Sessions.conference_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Conferences)
